# Primary sources

These sources are version-sensitive. Revalidate them against the deployed tool, client, or
database version before relying on version-specific guidance.

- PostgreSQL 18 ALTER TABLE: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/sql-altertable.html
- PostgreSQL 18 explicit locking: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/explicit-locking.html
- PostgreSQL 18 CREATE INDEX: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/sql-createindex.html
- PostgreSQL 18 progress reporting: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/progress-reporting.html
- PostgreSQL 18 lock management: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/runtime-config-locks.html
- PostgreSQL 18 client statement settings: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/runtime-config-client.html
- PostgreSQL 18 monitoring statistics: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/monitoring-stats.html
- PostgreSQL 18 routine vacuuming: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/routine-vacuuming.html
